task: add a comment to the top of src/app/api/health/route.ts describing what this route does

data.plan: Add a JSDoc-style comment at the top of src/app/api/health/route.ts explaining that this route provides a simple health check endpoint, typically used to verify the API server is running and reachable. No logic or functionality will be changed.
